definition: 形容某人看起来困惑、迷茫、心不在焉，就像网络错误"404 Not Found"一样——脑子宕机了，找不到信号，完全不在状态。

dialog.A: Same... I think I need coffee before I can process any more info.
dialog.B: Honestly? My brain is 404 coded right now. I zoned out completely.

examples.en: First day back at school and my brain is fully 404 coded.
examples.zh: 开学第一天，我的脑子完全宕机了。

examples.en: I asked him a simple question and he just stared at me — 404 coded.
examples.zh: 我问了他一个简单的问题，他只是盯着我看——完全懵了。

examples.en: After 3 hours of meetings, everyone in the room was 404 coded.
examples.zh: 开了3小时的会后，房间里每个人都处于离线状态了。
